data.title: This app
data.content:
This app sends notifications at all hours. I adjusted my settings and continued to receive notifications 24/7. I cancelled my subscription and removed the app through my App Store, but even still my alarms go off at all hours of the night even though not listed anywhere on my phone. If you value your sleep, DO NOT DOWNLOAD
 THIS APP!

I deleted the app today.

In fact, as a therapist, I have encouraged my clients to give positive affirmations a chance.  I am worthy of affirming my self on my way to the best version of me.

data.content:
Even if you delete this app it leaves a phantom alarm. It has been driving me absolutely crazy! 

UPDATE: So basically I have a phantom alarm on my phone from your app. It goes off daily at 11:45pm I had went through every inch of my phone and think I finally found a way to stop it. I redownloaded the app and when it got to the part about alarms I hit no and no notifications etc. so far it seems to have stopped!

data.title: I don’t receive affirmation notifications
data.content: I’m very disappointed with this app. The main reason I purchased it was to receive life affirmations throughout the day via phone notifications. Unfortunately, after the first day or two, the affirmations stopped completely. The only notification I now receive is a reminder to “practice,” which isn’t something I’m interested in. It’s frustrating that there doesn’t seem to be a clear way to contact support for assistance, and I haven’t found any helpful information addressing this issue in the help articles. Overall, this has been a very disappointing experience.

data.title: Developers can’t fix simple issue
data.content: I subscribed because this app had everything I wanted — the ability to add my own affirmations and customize the font and background of the widgets. Across several updates now the widgets simply do not work. The customization is clunky and the correct affirmations do not appear. We are not talking about a complicated app here. Loads of other affirmation apps get it right but so far I haven’t found one that also offers customized backgrounds. This looked great but they just can’t get it to work right. Don’t waste your money!

I’ve looked to see if there is a customer service number and can’t find one. It’s impossible to find a place to contact them and there are just a page full of Q&As that were not helpful. If you ever have a problem with this it will be extremely hard to get help fixing it.

data.author: WELLIAM❤️‍🔥

data.title: First affirmation app that I actually like and use, free version!
data.content:
I don’t typically write reviews.

This improves my daily mindset. The notification reminds me to take a moment to say an affirmation and I take a deep breath when I do. It helps me get through tough days at work calmly. 

The notifications aren’t a reminder to click into the app, the notifications are actually affirmations themselves. That’s one of the major difference I appreciate. 

The widget is a constant reminder as well. I don’t typically buy paid versions of apps but I want to with this one! 

Unfortunately it’s a bit too much money in my opinion. 

Overall done, well done developers! You deserve to get paid well, I wish I was in a place I could help!

data.title: Life Changing Transformation….
data.content: I have a million and one faults one of which is believing people whom I love. And trusting them over and over and over again until it’s too late. So just incase it is too late. I’m sorry Christian I love you with all of my heart and I AM with you wherever  you go just as you are always in my thoughts I love you more than the moon and the stars, more than the Heavens & the Skies, more than the Sunflower Loves the Sun. I AM always with you even after you too are no longer trapped on this rock. You have the most amazing friends & Family that will get you through this, and This too shall pass and return to dust in the wind. Be Strong, Be Courageous, Be Brave, Be Perseverant, and Above all Believe only yourself…. Love yourself first,  Always, keep this Apple iCloud app going always. I hope I’ve left enough for that…

data.title: Essential app
data.content: I really think this app is essential for all people who is lining up to their own truly path. We have time during the day to scroll other apps and engage to narcissistic conversations and exhaustion of thoughts as trash from not nourish conversation; been this a daily reality will totally interfere with your inner peace and alignment with your truly positive and productive thoughts for your path; I found this app messages during the day ; help me to stay grounded and to avoid interacting with others what comes with their narcissistic behavior and negativity thoughts. I totally recommend this application if you are working on your own path.
data.author: Sophie_#1

data.title: My experience
data.content: Thankfully this app has been a solid source of my motivation thank you the meaningful words available at any time
data.author: Kaliesia k

data.title: Love this app❣️
data.content: I have the amazing affirmations set on 7 times a day and I love the reminders to really open the app and read the days message. It’s just what we all can use for that encouragement and knowledge about yourself and the world around you.
data.author: LetsGoGurl

data.title: Widgets stopped working
data.content: I’ve been using this app for over a year paying for it too… and all the sudden all my widgets are broken and stuck on loading
data.author: shex101

data.title: Avis
data.content: Une application très cool
data.author: Bling Kpop Stan

data.title: Phone Screen Brilliance
data.content: Simply put, this is one of my favorite apps. I love that I can glance at my phone and see an affirmation. Mine is bright pink. So, it’s something about the simple words, the color, the light that shines when reading affirmations. The screens are beautiful so you’re not just inside the app, the visuals and sounds make it a 3 dimensional experience. Well done.
data.author: joaniewright

data.title: I love I am!
data.content: It’s helping me be more confident with myself!
data.author: M.I.A12345678910

data.title: New Mindest
data.content: It has help transform my mind in many great ways! I love it
data.author: Avione Denoxolaux

data.title: Afirmaciones
data.content: Las afirmaciones son muy acertadas para mí y me dan un gran empujón cada vez que leo una, parece que la app me conoce… siempre acierto con mis estados. Mil gracias por crear una app tan positiva.🙌🏾
data.author: larchynna

data.title: Aesthetically pleasing way to rewire neural pathways
data.content: I am trying to make my mind a more pleasant place to be. And practicing new thoughts is I’m working on that. This app has cute little pop up reminders of preset affirmations or you can create your own which is what I do. You can customize a widget or reminders, and time intervals for reminders. It helps me reach my mental health goals. All and all it’s a thumbs up app for me 👍🏻💜
data.author: Whotang

data.title: I prefer to know if it’s not free in advance..
data.content: I spent so much time answering all the questions only to find out at the end I have to pay to use the app. Let users know in advance , don’t make them spend time setting things up first , this is frustrating
data.author: JenniferKuz

data.content: Everything is good but VIP
